meta.title: America's had its own Kinzhal missile back in the '60s!
meta.description:
To be fair to Russia's Kinzhal, however, Skybolt never went into service because emerging ICBMs and SLBMs had many convinced that the days of long-range strategic bombers were at an end. 

This video isn't meant to suggest that the Kh47M2 Kinzhal poses no threat — ballistic missiles are extremely fast-moving targets that are difficult to intercept. But it's important to know that the Kinzhal isn't cutting-edge technology. It's just another Russian weapon system that benefits from a great deal of disinformation. 

#kinzhal #hypersonic #hypersonicmissile #ballisticmissile #militaryhistory #airpower #fighterjet #bomber #coldwar #ukraine #short #shorts
